g.text: PyHabitat: Python environment and build introspection
command Target function or routine to run
report Run the full pyhabitat environment report
on_termux Detect if running in Termux environment on Android,
on_freebsd Detect if running on FreeBSD.
on_linux Detect if running on Linux.
on_android Detect if running on Android.
on_windows Detect if running on Windows.
if running inside Windows Subsystem for
on_macos Detect if running on MacOS. Does not consider
Detects if running within a Crostini Linux container
on_ish_alpine Detect if running in iSH Alpine environment on iOS.
as_pyinstaller Detects if the Python script is running as a
in the course of generating a PyInstaller binary
as_frozen Detects if the Python script is running as a
is_msix Detect whether the current Python process is running
in_repl Detects if the code is running in the Python
interp_path Returns the path to the Python interpreter binary and
get_interp_shebang Returns the most compatible shebang for the current
Heuristic: are we probably in a CI/CD pipeline or non-
Check if the script is running in an interactive
can_spawn_shell Check if a shell command can be executed successfully.
Detect typical demo/kiosk Windows user account on
Heuristic check to see if the current code is running
Check if a shell command can be executed successfully.
Check if Matplotlib is available AND can use a GUI

Check if tkinter is available and can successfully
Check if a web browser can be launched in the current
is_elf Checks if the currently running executable

is_pipx Checks if the executable is running from a pipx

is_in_git_repo Checks if a path is in a Git repo.
read_magic_bytes Return the first few bytes of a file for type
Helper function to resolve an executable path and
SystemInfo Detects the current OS, distro, and version
edit_textfile Opens a file with the environment's default
launch_file Opens a file or directory with the host system's
Launch a daemon thread which waits for an HTTP server
find_open_port Return an available TCP port.
-h, --help show this help message and exit
-v, --version show program's version number and exit
--clear-cache Force fresh environment checks with cached results.
